_comment: issue #196 本素材包風格（第 2 層 packStyle）＋各單品描述（第 3 層 itemDesc）。維護工具可編輯，影像生成腳本據此組 prompt。

packStyle.name: 皇家斗篷室 Royal Cloak Room
packStyle.reference: European royal / regal aristocratic, gentle fairytale version

items.outer-yellow-cardigan: a little soft buttoned yellow knit cardigan
items.outer-starry-cape: a closed royal cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, scattered with small golden stars
items.outer-mint-cardigan: a soft mint-green royal knit cardigan with white collar and buttons
items.outer-rose-cardigan: a soft rose-pink royal knit cardigan with white collar and buttons
items.outer-moon-cape: a closed royal cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, decorated with a crescent moon and small stars
items.outer-aurora-cape: a closed royal cloak fastened at the neck and falling straight down the front, fully covering and showing only the smooth outer front surface — no front opening, no gap, no inside or lining visible, with a soft aurora gradient sheen
items.headtop-pearl-tiara: a delicate royal tiara set with small pearls
items.headtop-starry-tiara: a royal tiara topped with little star-shaped gems
items.headtop-ruby-tiara: a royal tiara set with a single red ruby gem
